## login (function)
- **Import:** `./utils/dashLogin.js`
- **Iframe:** top-level page
- **Properties:** (module-level, not class-based)
  - `LOGIN_SELECTORS.userIdInput` — selector: `[data-test="login-user-id-field"]`
  - `LOGIN_SELECTORS.passwordInput` — selector: `[data-test="login-password-field"]`
  - `LOGIN_SELECTORS.signInButton` — selector: `[data-test="login-sign-in"]`
- **Methods:**
  - `login(page)` — navigates to `process.env.ZO_BASE_URL`, fills email/password, clicks sign-in; 🌐 network-aware: waitForResponse matching `/auth/login` + status 200; waits for URL `${ZO_BASE_URL}/web/` after.

  - `dashboardCancelBtn` — selector: `[data-test="dashboard-add-dialog"] [data-test="o-dialog-secondary-btn"]`
- **Methods:**
  - `openAddDashboardForm()` — clicks `newDashboardBtn`, then waits for `dashboardDialog` to be visible (covers click + post-click wait).

  - `fillDashboardName(name)` / `submitDashboardForm()` — not used by this trace (raw trace cancels, does not submit).
